en.text: from H2658; a hole; only in connection with H6512, which ought rather to be joined as one word, thus ; by reduplication from H2658; a burrower, i.e. probably a rat

senses.gloss_en: from H2658; a hole; only in connection with H6512, which ought rather to be joined as one word, thus ; by reduplication from H2658; a burrower, i.e. probably a rat
